comments.author: @RawLifeDocumentary.EN26
comments.text: It’s heartbreaking to think about the long-term health impact on the children growing up there every single day.

comments.author: @globalatlasus
comments.text: It’s always the poorest who contribute the least to global emissions but suffer the worst from climate change.

comments.author: @GlobeTravelDocs
comments.text: This documentary is a powerful reminder that behind every statistic, there are real people fighting for a better life. Respect to the people of Dhaka.

comments.author: @GlobalCountryExplorer
comments.text: This reminds me that resilience is often born in the hardest places. Beyond the pollution and crowds, I hope people also see the strength, kindness, and spirit of Bangladesh’s people.
